creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: Looking into it a little, I am unsure how to fix this. I am not a Java developer, but skimming over the source code on GitHub, it appears that when they removed the options for checking if an internal Flash player should be used or not, they missed one part that relies on a variable that is set when there is no external Flash player available. (Or maybe it was left intentionally?) Unfortunately, I don't know if this is something I can fix for FreeBSD, as with version 12.0.0 of FFDec, they've marked the software as abandoned and won't take new issues and won't fix bugs.
